        <Trajectory name="trajectory" closed="false">
          <Shape>
            <Nurbs order="4">
              <ControlPoint weight="1.0">
                <Position>
                  <RelativeLanePosition entityRef="$entity_name" dsLane="0.0" offset="0.0" dLane="0" />
                </Position>
              </ControlPoint>
              <ControlPoint weight="1.0">
                <Position>
                  <RelativeLanePosition entityRef="$entity_name" dsLane="${$traj_length*0.2}" offset="${$cutin_direction*$lane_width*0.1}" dLane="0" />
                </Position>
              </ControlPoint>
              <ControlPoint weight="1.0">
                <Position>
                  <RelativeLanePosition entityRef="$entity_name" dsLane="${$traj_length*0.6}" offset="${$cutin_direction*$lane_width*0.5}" dLane="0" />
                </Position>
              </ControlPoint>
              <ControlPoint weight="1.0">
                <Position>
                  <RelativeLanePosition entityRef="$entity_name" dsLane="${$traj_length*0.8}" offset="${$cutin_direction*$lane_width*0.9}" dLane="0" />
                </Position>
              </ControlPoint>
              <ControlPoint weight="1.0">
                <Position>
                  <RelativeLanePosition entityRef="$entity_name" dsLane="${$traj_length}" offset="${$cutin_direction*$lane_width}" dLane="0" />
                </Position>
              </ControlPoint>
              <Knot value="0" />
              <Knot value="0" />
              <Knot value="0" />
              <Knot value="0" />
              <Knot value="0.5" />
              <Knot value="1" />
              <Knot value="1" />
              <Knot value="1" />
              <Knot value="1" />
            </Nurbs>
          </Shape>
        </Trajectory>
      </TrajectoryRef>
      <TimeReference>
        <None />
      </TimeReference>
      <TrajectoryFollowingMode followingMode="position" />
    </FollowTrajectoryAction>
  </RoutingAction>
</PrivateAction>

description: drives smoothly (FollowTrajectory) along a smooth NURBS trajectory of order 3 passing from the point of the relative road (ds=0) through the control points of the relative lane (dLane=0, dsLane=0), the relative lane (dLane=-1, dsLane=0), and the relative lane (dLane=-1, dsLane=0).

            <ControlPoint time="3" weight="1.2">
              <Position>
                <RelativeLanePosition dLane="0" ds="50" entityRef="Target" offset="20.0" />
              </Position>
            </ControlPoint>
            <ControlPoint time="6.7" weight="0.7">
              <Position>
                <RelativeLanePosition dLane="-1" ds="100" entityRef="Target" offset="-10.0" />
              </Position>
            </ControlPoint>
            <ControlPoint time="9.7" weight="1.0">
              <Position>
                <RelativeLanePosition dLane="-1" ds="180" entityRef="Target" offset="1.535" />
              </Position>
            </ControlPoint>
            <ControlPoint time="12.2" weight="1.0">
              <Position>
                <RelativeLanePosition dLane="-1" ds="220" entityRef="Target" offset="0.0" />
              </Position>
            </ControlPoint>
            <Knot value="0.0" />
            <Knot value="0.0" />
            <Knot value="0.0" />
            <Knot value="0.3333" />
            <Knot value="0.6667" />
            <Knot value="1.0" />
            <Knot value="1.0" />
            <Knot value="1.0" />
          </Nurbs>
        </Shape>
      </Trajectory>
      <TimeReference>
        <Timing domainAbsoluteRelative="relative" offset="0" scale="1" />
      </TimeReference>
      <TrajectoryFollowingMode followingMode="position" />
    </FollowTrajectoryAction>
  </RoutingAction>
</PrivateAction>

          <CatalogReference catalogName="TrajectoryCatalog" entryName="Ego_CxCscp" />
        </TrajectoryRef>
      </TrajectoryPosition>
    </TargetPositionMaster>
    <TargetPosition>
      <TrajectoryPosition s="$_Target_syncS">
        <TrajectoryRef>
          <CatalogReference catalogName="TrajectoryCatalog" entryName="$Target_trajectory" />
        </TrajectoryRef>
      </TrajectoryPosition>
    </TargetPosition>
    <FinalSpeed>
      <AbsoluteSpeed value="$_Target_final_speed">
        <TargetTimeSteadyState time="$Target_steadyStateTTC" />
      </AbsoluteSpeed>
    </FinalSpeed>
  </SynchronizeAction>
</PrivateAction>

description: synchronizes at the point when the master object (Ego) reaches the trajectory 'Ego_CxTx' (s=$_Ego_syncS). its driving speed with the absolute speed $_Target_finalSpeedm/s to reach the trajectory 'Target_straightAcross' (s=$_Target_syncS).
code:
<PrivateAction>
  <SynchronizeAction masterEntityRef="Ego">
    <TargetPositionMaster>
      <TrajectoryPosition s="$_Ego_syncS">
        <TrajectoryRef>
          <CatalogReference catalogName="TrajectoryCatalog" entryName="Ego_CxTx">
            <ParameterAssignments>
              <ParameterAssignment value="${$Ego_turningDirection*$_Trajectory_kappa1}" parameterRef="kappa1" />
              <ParameterAssignment value="${$Ego_turningDirection*$_Trajectory_kappa2}" parameterRef="kappa2" />
              <ParameterAssignment value="$_Trajectory_clothoidLength" parameterRef="clothoidLength" />
              <ParameterAssignment value="$_Trajectory_arcLength" parameterRef="arcLength" />
              <ParameterAssignment value="$_Ego_initS" parameterRef="start_s" />
              <ParameterAssignment value="$_Trajectory_straightLength" parameterRef="straight_length" />
            </ParameterAssignments>
          </CatalogReference>
        </TrajectoryRef>
      </TrajectoryPosition>
    </TargetPositionMaster>
    <TargetPosition>
      <TrajectoryPosition s="$_Target_syncS">
        <TrajectoryRef>
          <CatalogReference catalogName="TrajectoryCatalog" entryName="Target_straightAcross" />
        </TrajectoryRef>
      </TrajectoryPosition>
    </TargetPosition>
    <FinalSpeed>
      <AbsoluteSpeed value="$_Target_finalSpeed">
        <TargetDistanceSteadyState distance="$Target_steadyStateDist" />
      </AbsoluteSpeed>
    </FinalSpeed>
  </SynchronizeAction>
</PrivateAction>

description: changes the speed to ${$_Target_final_speed}m/s linearly at a rate of $Target_decelerationm/s².

sets at the point when the master object (Ego) reaches the -1st lane of road 0 (s=${$VRU_initS-$_Ego_frontBumperLon-$VRU_width/2}). its absolute speed to reach the trajectory 'VRU_CPx' (s=${$VRU_initLatDist+$_Ego_impactPointOffset-$VRU_collisionPointOffset}). Synchronize the driving speed with $_VRU_finalSpeedm/s.
code:
<PrivateAction>
  <SynchronizeAction masterEntityRef="Ego">
    <TargetPositionMaster>
      <LanePosition roadId="0" laneId="-1" s="${$VRU_initS-$_Ego_frontBumperLon-$VRU_width/2}" />
    </TargetPositionMaster>
    <TargetPosition>
      <TrajectoryPosition s="${$VRU_initLatDist+$_Ego_impactPointOffset-$VRU_collisionPointOffset}">
        <TrajectoryRef>
          <CatalogReference catalogName="TrajectoryCatalog" entryName="VRU_CPx">
            <ParameterAssignments>
              <ParameterAssignment value="$VRU_initS" parameterRef="VRU_initS" />
              <ParameterAssignment value="${-$VRU_initLatDist}" parameterRef="VRU_latDist" />
              <ParameterAssignment value="$VRU_trajectoryOrientation" parameterRef="trajectoryOrientation" />
            </ParameterAssignments>
          </CatalogReference>
        </TrajectoryRef>
      </TrajectoryPosition>
    </TargetPosition>
    <FinalSpeed>
      <AbsoluteSpeed value="$_VRU_finalSpeed">
        <TargetDistanceSteadyState distance="${$VRU_initLatDist-$VRU_accelerationDist}" />
      </AbsoluteSpeed>
    </FinalSpeed>
  </SynchronizeAction>
</PrivateAction>

description: activates longitudinal and lateral controllers.
drives with an offset of $Swerve_Offset_Left_mm based on the road.
drives with an offset of 0.0m from the road.
drives with an offset of $Swerve_Offset_Right_mm based on the road.

drives precisely (FollowTrajectory) along a straight line (Polyline) trajectory that moves in order from the $Ego_InitPosition_LaneId lane (s=$TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LongitudinalOffset_m) point on road 0 to the $Ego_InitPosition_LaneId lane (s=$TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LongitudinalOffset_m) point on road 0..
code:
<PrivateAction>
  <RoutingAction>
    <FollowTrajectoryAction>
      <TrajectoryRef>
        <Trajectory name="CrossTrajectory" closed="false">
          <Shape>
            <Polyline>
              <Vertex time="0">
                <Position>
                  <LanePosition roadId="0" laneId="$Ego_InitPosition_LaneId" offset="$TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LateralOffset_m" s="$TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LongitudinalOffset_m">
                    <Orientation h="$TargetBlocking_InitPosition_Heading_rad" />
                  </LanePosition>
                </Position>
              </Vertex>
              <Vertex time="${2 * sqrt( $TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LateralOffset_m * $TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LateralOffset_m ) / ($TargetBlocking_Speed_kph / 3.6)}">
                <Position>
                  <LanePosition roadId="0" laneId="$Ego_InitPosition_LaneId" offset="${-$TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LateralOffset_m}" s="$TargetBlocking_InitPosition_LongitudinalOffset_m">
                    <Orientation h="$TargetBlocking_InitPosition_Heading_rad" />
                  </LanePosition>
                </Position>
              </Vertex>
            </Polyline>
          </Shape>
        </Trajectory>
      </TrajectoryRef>
      <TimeReference>
        <Timing domainAbsoluteRelative="relative" scale="1.0" offset="0.0" />
      </TimeReference>
      <TrajectoryFollowingMode followingMode="position" />
    </FollowTrajectoryAction>
  </RoutingAction>
</PrivateAction>
